name: METFORAGING metformin epigenetic-age pilot trial
summary: A 96-week double-blind randomized placebo-controlled pilot trial testing 850 mg metformin twice daily against epigenetic-age biomarkers in non-diabetic older people living with controlled HIV.
population: Non-diabetic people living with HIV aged 50 years or older with virologic suppression and CD4+ T-cell counts above 500 cells/uL
